title: Super Slurper
excerpt: description: Copy objects from other cloud providers to R2 in a one-off bulk migration job. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Super Slurper allows you to quickly and easily copy objects from other cloud providers to an R2 bucket of your choice. * Preserve custom object metadata from source bucket by copying them on the migrated objects on R2.
